tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control, and low fasting glucose, which may suggest overtreatment or risk of hypoglycemia. Other parameters, including renal function and electrolytes, are within normal limits except for slightly low total CO₂, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

name.value: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
